description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the mcr.microsoft.com/dotnet/core/sdk:3.1 Docker image and defines two stages: test and build. In the test stage add a test job that runs curl -L https://yt-dl.org/downloads/latest/youtube-dl -o /usr/local/bin/youtube-dl, chmod a+rx /usr/local/bin/youtube-dl, dotnet restore, and dotnet test test/NYoutubeDL.Tests/NYoutubeDL.Tests.csproj. In the build stage add a build job that runs dotnet restore, dotnet build -c Release src/NYoutubeDL/NYoutubeDL.csproj, dotnet pack -c Release src/NYoutubeDL/NYoutubeDL.csproj, stores the src/NYoutubeDL/bin/Release/ directory as an artifact, and only runs for tag pipelines.
